About Me

01 / About

About Me

ReactNode.jsThree.jsTypeScriptPythonWeb3

I'm a full-stack developer and creative technologist based in San Francisco, obsessed with building digital experiences that live at the intersection of design and engineering.

With 5+ years crafting products at startups and agencies, I bring together deep technical expertise and an eye for aesthetics to ship products that users genuinely love. Currently exploring the frontier of real-time 3D web, generative AI interfaces, and decentralized applications.

⚡

Performance-First

Sub-100ms interactions, optimized bundles, and 95+ Lighthouse scores.

🎨

Creative Vision

Blending art and engineering to craft interfaces people remember.

🔗

Full-Stack Depth

From database schemas to pixel-perfect UIs — I own the whole stack.

🌐

Web3 Native

Smart contracts, dApps, and decentralized protocols since 2020.

5+Years Experience
30+Projects Shipped
10+Happy Clients
